    <item>
        <guid>nba527289</guid>
        <title>Gui Santos: Strikes for 25 points in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/gui-santos-5738</link>
        <description>Santos tallied 25 points (9-14 FG, 2-6 3Pt, 5-6 FT), four rebounds, four assists and two steals in 31 minutes during Thursday's 118-111 loss to the Cavaliers.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 02 Apr 2026 9:43:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527288</guid>
        <title>Max Strus: Catches fire from deep</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/max-strus-4947</link>
        <description>Strus produced 24 points (9-14 FG, 6-10 3Pt), five rebounds and two assists in 28 minutes during Thursday's 118-111 win over the Warriors.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 02 Apr 2026 9:39:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527287</guid>
        <title>Shai Gilgeous-Alexander: Adds 28 points in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/shai-gilgeous-alexander-4387</link>
        <description>Gilgeous-Alexander registered 28 points (12-25 FG, 1-4 3Pt, 3-3 FT), seven rebounds and seven assists in 30 minutes during Thursday's 139-96 win over the Lakers.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 02 Apr 2026 9:24:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527286</guid>
        <title>Luguentz Dort: Fails to return</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/luguentz-dort-4808</link>
        <description>Dort (undisclosed) didn't return to Thursday's game against the Lakers. He finished with 14 points (5-8 FG, 4-6 3Pt), one assist and two steals in 21 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 02 Apr 2026 8:57:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527285</guid>
        <title>Daniss Jenkins: Turns in strong scoring effort</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/daniss-jenkins-6336</link>
        <description>Jenkins posted 26 points (9-19 FG, 2-2 3Pt, 6-7 FT), five rebounds and eight assists across 37 minutes during Thursday's 113-108 win over the Timberwolves.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 02 Apr 2026 8:50:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
